same_bay_evidence.description: Incident bay name 'BAY 1' provided by user.
All records agree with incident station 'GOLDEN TEST'.
Records come from different relay/device ids: ['RELAY_21', 'RELAY_87L'] — consistent with same-bay multi-relay capture (e.g. distance + differential).

reconstruction.narrative:
2 COMTRADE records from the same bay were reconstructed into 2 fault episodes.

Episode 1 was a single-line-to-ground (A fault).
Episode 2 was a single-line-to-ground (A fault). This episode has an uncertain relationship to the previous episode.

The per-record physical-cause signatures are consistent with each other.
The physical initiating cause remains unconfirmed from local COMTRADE evidence alone; external evidence (field inspection, lightning detection, protection engineer review) is needed to confirm it.
